# mirror-github-to-gitlab-ce
Description: Configure a GitHub Actions workflow to automatically mirror a GitHub repository to a GitLab Community Edition repository on every push.
Source: project
To mirror a GitHub repository to a GitLab Community Edition repository:

1.  **Create the Workflow File**: In your GitHub repository, create a new file at `.github/workflows/mirror-to-gitlab.yml`.

2.  **Add Workflow Content**: Populate the `mirror-to-gitlab.yml` file with the following YAML:
    ```yaml
    name: Mirror to GitLab

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - "**"   # triggers on push to any branch

jobs:
  mirror:
    name: Push to GitLab
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository (full history)
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0   # required — mirror needs full history

      - name: Configure Git identity
        run: |
          git config user.email "ci-mirror@yourdomain.com"
          git config user.name "GitHub Mirror Bot"

      - name: Push to GitLab
        run: |
          git remote add gitlab "${{ secrets.GITLAB_MIRROR_URL }}"
          git push gitlab --all --force
          git push gitlab --tags --force
        env:
          GIT_TERMINAL_PROMPT: 0
    ```

3.  **Create GitLab Personal Access Token (PAT)**: In GitLab, generate a Personal Access Token with `api` and `write_repository` scopes.

4.  **Create GitHub Secret**: In your GitHub repository, navigate to `Settings` > `Secrets and variables` > `Actions`.

5.  **Add `GITLAB_MIRROR_URL` Secret**: Click `New repository secret` and add a secret named `GITLAB_MIRROR_URL` with the value formatted as `https://oauth2:<YOUR_GITLAB_PAT>@your.gitlab.instance/group/repo.git`. Replace `<YOUR_GITLAB_PAT>` with the token from step 3, `your.gitlab.instance` with your GitLab domain, and `/group/repo.git` with the path to your target GitLab repository.

Once configured, every push to any branch in your GitHub repository will trigger this workflow, pushing all changes and tags to the specified GitLab repository.
